info.title: Session Bridge status bar click behavior modification

parts.text: Clicking on Session Bridge plugin status in the status bar should open the plugin view instead of showing the CLI status
Clicking on Session Bridge plugin status in the status bar should open the plugin view instead of showing the CLI status
I'll help you modify the status bar item to open the plugin view instead of showing CLI status. Let me first explore the codebase to understand the current implementation.

state.output:
<path>/Users/savekirk/dev/ai/entire/session-bridge/src/components/entireStatusBarItem.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import * as vscode from "vscode";
2: import { EntireStatusState, EntireWorkspaceState } from "../workspaceProbe";
3: 
4: interface StatusBarInfo {
5:   iconName: string;
6:   title: string;
7:   description: string;
8:   backgroundColor?: vscode.ThemeColor;
9: }
10: 
11: const WARNING_BACKGROUND = new vscode.ThemeColor("statusBarItem.warningBackground");
12: 
13: const statusInfoMap: Record<EntireStatusState, StatusBarInfo> = {
14:   [EntireStatusState.ENABLED]: {
15:     iconName: "git-compare",
16:     title: "Enabled",
17:     description: "Entire is enabled for this repository.",
18:   },
19:   [EntireStatusState.CLI_MISSING]: {
20:     iconName: "warning",
21:     title: "Not Found",
22:     description: "The Entire CLI is not available in the extension host environment.",
23:     backgroundColor: WARNING_BACKGROUND,
24:   },
25:   [EntireStatusState.NOT_GIT_REPO]: {
26:     iconName: "repo",
27:     title: "Not a git repo",
28:     description: "Open a Git repository to use Entire features.",
29:   },
30:   [EntireStatusState.DISABLED]: {
31:     iconName: "circle-slash",
32:     title: "Not Enabled",
33:     description: "Entire is not enabled for this repository.",
34:   },
35: };
36: 
37: function getStatusBarInfo(workspaceState: EntireWorkspaceState): StatusBarInfo {
38: 	if (workspaceState.state !== EntireStatusState.ENABLED) {
39: 		return statusInfoMap[workspaceState.state];
40: 	}
41: 
42: 	const sessionCount = workspaceState.activeSessions.length;
43: 	if (sessionCount > 1) {
44: 		const activeCount = workspaceState.activeSessions.filter((session) => session.status === "ACTIVE").length;
45: 		return {
46: 			iconName: "layers",
47: 			title: `${sessionCount} Sessions`,
48: 			description: activeCount > 0
49: 				? `Multiple Entire sessions are live in this workspace (${activeCount} active).`
50: 				: "Multiple Entire sessions are live in this workspace.",
51: 		};
52: 	}
53: 
54: 	if (sessionCount === 1) {
55: 		const session = workspaceState.activeSessions[0];
56: 		const agent = formatAgentName(session.agent);
57: 		const stateLabel = session.status === "ACTIVE" ? "Active" : "Idle";
58: 
59: 		return {
60: 			iconName: session.status === "ACTIVE" ? "pulse" : "clock",
61: 			title: agent ? `${stateLabel} · ${agent}` : stateLabel,
62: 			description: session.status === "ACTIVE"
63: 				? "Entire is actively tracking a session in this workspace."
64: 				: "Entire is tracking an idle live session in this workspace.",
65: 		};
66: 	}
67: 
68:   return statusInfoMap[EntireStatusState.ENABLED];
69: }
70: 
71: function buildTooltip(statusInfo: StatusBarInfo, workspaceState: EntireWorkspaceState): vscode.MarkdownString {
72:   const tooltip = new vscode.MarkdownString(undefined, true);
73:   tooltip.isTrusted = false;
74:   tooltip.supportThemeIcons = true;
75: 
76:   tooltip.appendMarkdown(`**Entire**\n\n`);
77:   tooltip.appendMarkdown("**Status:** ");
78:   tooltip.appendText(statusInfo.title);
79:   tooltip.appendText("\n");
80:   tooltip.appendText(statusInfo.description);
81: 
82:   if (workspaceState.binary?.cliVersion) {
83:     tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n**CLI Version:** ");
84:     tooltip.appendText(workspaceState.binary.cliVersion);
85:   }
86: 
87:   const sessionCount = workspaceState.activeSessions.length;
88:   tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n\n**Sessions:** ");
89:   tooltip.appendText(String(sessionCount));
90: 
91:   if (sessionCount > 0) {
92:     for (const session of workspaceState.activeSessions.slice(0, 3)) {
93:       tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n- ");
94:       tooltip.appendText(describeSession(session));
95:     }
96: 
97:     if (sessionCount > 3) {
98:       tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n- ");
99:       tooltip.appendText(`${sessionCount - 3} more session(s)`);
100:     }
101:   }
102: 
103:   if (workspaceState.settings?.settingsPaths.length) {
104:     tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n\n**Settings Files:** ");
105:     tooltip.appendText(String(workspaceState.settings.settingsPaths.length));
106:   }
107: 
108:   if (workspaceState.warnings.length > 0) {
109:     tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n\n**Warnings**");
110:     for (const warning of workspaceState.warnings) {
111:       tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n- ");
112:       tooltip.appendText(warning);
113:     }
114:   }
115: 
116:   tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n\n_Click to show Entire status._");
117: 
118:   return tooltip;
119: }
120: 
121: function describeSession(session: EntireWorkspaceState["activeSessions"][number]): string {
122: 	const parts: string[] = [];
123: 	const agent = formatAgentName(session.agent);
124: 
125: 	if (agent) {
126: 		parts.push(agent);
127: 	}
128: 	if (session.model) {
129: 		parts.push(session.model);
130: 	}
131: 	if (session.status) {
132: 		parts.push(session.status);
133: 	}
134: 	if (session.sessionId) {
135: 		parts.push(`#${session.sessionId.slice(0, 8)}`);
136: 	}
137: 
138:   return parts.join(" · ");
139: }
140: 
141: function formatAgentName(agentType?: string): string | undefined {
142:   if (!agentType) {
143:     return undefined;
144:   }
145: 
146:   return agentType
147:     .split(/[-_]/g)
148:     .filter(Boolean)
149:     .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
150:     .join(" ");
151: }
152: 
153: export function createStatusBarItem(command: string, workspaceState: EntireWorkspaceState): vscode.StatusBarItem {
154:   const statusBarItem = vscode.window.createStatusBarItem(
155:     "session.bridge.entire.status",
156:     vscode.StatusBarAlignment.Left,
157:     100,
158:   );
159:   updateStatusBarItem(statusBarItem, command, workspaceState);
160: 
161:   return statusBarItem;
162: }
163: 
164: export function updateStatusBarItem(
165:   statusBarItem: vscode.StatusBarItem,
166:   command: string,
167:   workspaceState: EntireWorkspaceState,
168: ): void {
169:   const statusInfo = getStatusBarInfo(workspaceState);
170:   const label = `Session Bridge (Entire): ${statusInfo.title}`;
171: 
172:   statusBarItem.name = "Session Bridge Status";
173:   statusBarItem.text = `$(${statusInfo.iconName}) ${label}`;
174:   statusBarItem.tooltip = buildTooltip(statusInfo, workspaceState);
175:   statusBarItem.command = command;
176:   statusBarItem.backgroundColor = statusInfo.backgroundColor;
177:   statusBarItem.accessibilityInformation = {
178:     label,
179:     role: "button",
180:   };
181: }

(End of file - total 181 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import * as vscode from 'vscode';
2: import * as path from 'path';
3: import { isEntireBinary, resolveEntireBinary } from './entireBinaryResolver';
4: import { getGitCommonDir, getGitRepoRoot, METADATA_BRANCH_NAME, tryExecGit } from './checkpoints/util';
5: import { fetchDefaultCheckpointBranch } from './checkpointBranch';
6: import { EntireStatusState, probeEntireWorkspace, resetAutomaticCheckpointFetchAttempt } from './workspaceProbe';
7: import { createStatusBarItem, updateStatusBarItem } from './components/entireStatusBarItem';
8: import { SessionDetailsPanel } from './components/sessionDetailsPanel';
9: import { SessionsTreeViewProvider, getSessionDetailTarget, type SessionsViewCommands } from './components/sessionsTreeView';
10: import { CheckpointTreeViewProvider, getCheckpointSelectionContext, type CheckpointViewCommands } from './components/checkpointTreeView';
11: import { getRawTranscript, getSessionDetail, type SessionCheckpointEntry, type SessionTranscriptTarget } from './checkpoints';
12: import { runCommandAsync } from './runCommand';
13: 
14: const ENTIRE_OUTPUT_CHANNEL = 'SESSION_BRIDGE';
15: const ENTIRE_CONTAINER_ID = 'session-bridge';
16: const SESSIONS_VIEW_ID = 'session.bridge.entire.sessions';
17: const CHECKPOINTS_VIEW_ID = 'session.bridge.entire.checkpoints';
18: const enum COMMAND_ID {
19: 	SHOW_STATUS = "session.bridge.entire.showStatus",
20: 	ENABLE = "session.bridge.entire.enable",
21: 	DISABLE = "session.bridge.entire.disable",
22: 	REFRESH = "session.bridge.entire.refresh",
23: 	FETCH_CHECKPOINT_BRANCH = "session.bridge.entire.fetchCheckpointBranch",
24: 	BROWSE_CHECKPOINTS = "session.bridge.entire.browseCheckpoints",
25: 	OPEN_COMMIT_CHANGES = "session.bridge.entire.openCommitChanges",
26: 	OPEN_SESSION_TRANSCRIPT = "session.bridge.entire.openSessionTranscript",
27: 	CLEAN = "session.bridge.entire.clean",
28: 	RESET = "session.bridge.entire.reset",
29: 	SHOW_TRACE = "session.bridge.entire.showTrace"
30: }
31: 
32: const TREE_VIEW_IDS = [
33: 	SESSIONS_VIEW_ID,
34: 	CHECKPOINTS_VIEW_ID,
35: ] as const;
36: 
37: const COMMAND_TITLES: Record<COMMAND_ID, string> = {
38: 	[COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS]: 'Show Status',
39: 	[COMMAND_ID.ENABLE]: 'Enable In Repository',
40: 	[COMMAND_ID.DISABLE]: 'Disable In Repository',
41: 	[COMMAND_ID.REFRESH]: 'Refresh',
42: 	[COMMAND_ID.FETCH_CHECKPOINT_BRANCH]: 'Fetch Checkpoint Branch',
43: 	[COMMAND_ID.BROWSE_CHECKPOINTS]: 'Browse Checkpoints',
44: 	[COMMAND_ID.OPEN_COMMIT_CHANGES]: 'Open Commit Changes',
45: 	[COMMAND_ID.OPEN_SESSION_TRANSCRIPT]: 'Open Session Transcript',
46: 	[COMMAND_ID.CLEAN]: 'Clean Entire State',
47: 	[COMMAND_ID.RESET]: 'Reset Entire Session Data',
48: 	[COMMAND_ID.SHOW_TRACE]: 'Show Trace'
49: };
50: 
51: 
52: const WORKSPACE_CONTEXT: [EntireStatusState, string][] = [
53: 	[EntireStatusState.CLI_MISSING, 'session.bridge.state.cli-missing'],
54: 	[EntireStatusState.DISABLED, 'session.bridge.state.disabled'],
55: 	[EntireStatusState.ENABLED, 'session.bridge.state.enabled'],
56: 	[EntireStatusState.NOT_GIT_REPO, 'session.bridge.state.not-git-repo']
57: ];
58: 
59: interface GitApi {
60: 	getRepository(uri: vscode.Uri): GitRepository | null;
61: 	openRepository(uri: vscode.Uri): Promise<GitRepository | null>;
62: }
63: 
64: interface GitRepository {
65: 	readonly rootUri: vscode.Uri;
66: }
67: 
68: interface GitExtension {
69: 	getAPI(version: 1): GitApi;
70: }
71: 
72: interface CommitChangesTarget {
73: 	commitSha?: string;
74: 	repoPath?: string;
75: }
76: 
77: const setWorkspaceContext = async (
78: 	workspaceState: EntireStatusState,
79: ) => {
80: 	for (const context of WORKSPACE_CONTEXT) {
81: 		const status = context[0] === workspaceState;
82: 		const key = context[1];
83: 		await vscode.commands.executeCommand('setContext', key, status);
84: 	}
85: };
86: 
87: export async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
88: 	const outputChannel = vscode.window.createOutputChannel(ENTIRE_OUTPUT_CHANNEL);
89: 	context.subscriptions.push(outputChannel);
90: 
91: 	const initialProbeTarget = await resolveProbeTargetPath();
92: 	let workspaceState = await probeEntireWorkspace(initialProbeTarget);
93: 	await setWorkspaceContext(workspaceState.state);
94: 	const statusBarItem = createStatusBarItem(COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS, workspaceState);
95: 	if (vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.length) {
96: 		statusBarItem.show();
97: 		context.subscriptions.push(statusBarItem);
98: 	}
99: 
100: 	const checkpointCommands = {
101: 		refresh: COMMAND_ID.REFRESH,
102: 		openCommitChanges: COMMAND_ID.OPEN_COMMIT_CHANGES,
103: 	} satisfies CheckpointViewCommands;
104: 
105: 	const checkpointProvider = new CheckpointTreeViewProvider(
106: 		workspaceState,
107: 		initialProbeTarget,
108: 		checkpointCommands,
109: 		outputChannel,
110: 	);
111: 	const sessionCommands = {
112: 		refresh: COMMAND_ID.REFRESH,
113: 		showStatus: COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS,
114: 		openSessionTranscript: COMMAND_ID.OPEN_SESSION_TRANSCRIPT,
115: 	} satisfies SessionsViewCommands;
116: 	const checkpointSessionsProvider = new SessionsTreeViewProvider(
117: 		workspaceState,
118: 		initialProbeTarget,
119: 		sessionCommands,
120: 		outputChannel,
121: 	);
122: 	const sessionDetailsPanel = new SessionDetailsPanel(outputChannel);
123: 	context.subscriptions.push(sessionDetailsPanel);
124: 
125: 	const checkpointSessionsTreeView = vscode.window.createTreeView(SESSIONS_VIEW_ID, {
126: 		treeDataProvider: checkpointSessionsProvider,
127: 		showCollapseAll: true,
128: 	});
129: 	context.subscriptions.push(checkpointSessionsTreeView);
130: 	const checkpointTreeView = vscode.window.createTreeView(CHECKPOINTS_VIEW_ID, {
131: 		treeDataProvider: checkpointProvider,
132: 		showCollapseAll: true,
133: 	});
134: 	context.subscriptions.push(checkpointTreeView);
135: 	context.subscriptions.push(checkpointTreeView.onDidChangeSelection((event) => {
136: 		const selection = getCheckpointSelectionContext(event.selection[0]);
137: 		outputChannel.appendLine(
138: 			`[checkpoint-selection] checkpointId=${selection?.checkpointId ?? "(none)"}, sessionPaths=${selection?.sessionPaths.length ?? 0}`,
139: 		);
140: 		checkpointSessionsProvider.setCheckpointSelection(selection);
141: 	}));
142: 
143: 	let sessionDetailLoadGeneration = 0;
144: 	const showSelectedSessionDetail = async (selection: vscode.TreeItem | undefined) => {
145: 		const target = getSessionDetailTarget(selection);
146: 		if (!target) {
147: 			return;
148: 		}
149: 
150: 		const repoPath = await resolveProbeTargetPath();
151: 		if (!repoPath) {
152: 			sessionDetailsPanel.showError("Open a repository folder to inspect session details.");
153: 			return;
154: 		}
155: 
156: 		const generation = ++sessionDetailLoadGeneration;
157: 		sessionDetailsPanel.showLoading(target);
158: 
159: 		try {
160: 			const detail = await getSessionDetail(repoPath, target);
161: 			if (generation !== sessionDetailLoadGeneration) {
162: 				return;
163: 			}
164: 
165: 			if (!detail) {
166: 				sessionDetailsPanel.showError("Session details are no longer available for the selected item.");
167: 				return;
168: 			}
169: 
170: 			sessionDetailsPanel.showDetail(detail);
171: 		} catch (error) {
172: 			const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to load session details";
173: 			outputChannel.appendLine(`[session-details] load error: ${message}`);
174: 			if (generation !== sessionDetailLoadGeneration) {
175: 				return;
176: 			}
177: 
178: 			sessionDetailsPanel.showError(message);
179: 		}
180: 	};
181: 	context.subscriptions.push(checkpointSessionsTreeView.onDidChangeSelection((event) => {
182: 		void showSelectedSessionDetail(event.selection[0]);
183: 	}));
184: 
185: 	const appendCommandRun = (commandId: COMMAND_ID) => {
186: 		outputChannel.appendLine(`[command] ${COMMAND_TITLES[commandId] ?? commandId}`);
187: 	};
188: 
189: 	let probeWatchers: vscode.Disposable[] = [];
190: 	let watchedRepoPath: string | undefined;
191: 	let pendingProbeRefresh: NodeJS.Timeout | undefined;
192: 
193: 	const disposeProbeWatchers = () => {
194: 		for (const disposable of probeWatchers) {
195: 			disposable.dispose();
196: 		}
197: 		probeWatchers = [];
198: 		watchedRepoPath = undefined;
199: 	};
200: 
201: 	const scheduleProbeRefresh = (reason: string) => {
202: 		if (pendingProbeRefresh) {
203: 			clearTimeout(pendingProbeRefresh);
204: 		}
205: 
206: 		pendingProbeRefresh = setTimeout(() => {
207: 			pendingProbeRefresh = undefined;
208: 			void refreshWorkspaceProbe(reason);
209: 		}, 150);
210: 	};
211: 
212: 
213: 	const addProbeWatcher = (watcher: vscode.FileSystemWatcher, reason: string) => {
214: 		probeWatchers.push(
215: 			watcher,
216: 			watcher.onDidCreate(() => scheduleProbeRefresh(reason)),
217: 			watcher.onDidChange(() => scheduleProbeRefresh(reason)),
218: 			watcher.onDidDelete(() => scheduleProbeRefresh(reason)),
219: 		);
220: 	};
221: 
222: 	const updateProbeWatchers = async (repoPath: string | undefined) => {
223: 		if (!repoPath) {
224: 			disposeProbeWatchers();
225: 			return;
226: 		}
227: 
228: 		if (watchedRepoPath === repoPath && probeWatchers.length > 0) {
229: 			return;
230: 		}
231: 
232: 		disposeProbeWatchers();
233: 		watchedRepoPath = repoPath;
234: 
235: 		addProbeWatcher(
236: 			vscode.workspace.createFileSystemWatcher(new vscode.RelativePattern(repoPath, '.entire/settings*.json')),
237: 			'entire settings changed',
238: 		);
239: 
240: 		const headRelativePath = (await tryExecGit(repoPath, ['rev-parse', '--git-path', 'HEAD']))?.trim();
241: 		if (headRelativePath) {
242: 			const headAbsolutePath = path.resolve(repoPath, headRelativePath);
243: 			addProbeWatcher(
244: 				vscode.workspace.createFileSystemWatcher(
245: 					new vscode.RelativePattern(path.dirname(headAbsolutePath), path.basename(headAbsolutePath)),
246: 				),
247: 				'git HEAD changed',
248: 			);
249: 		}
250: 
251: 		const gitCommonDir = await getGitCommonDir(repoPath);
252: 		if (gitCommonDir) {
253: 			addProbeWatcher(
254: 				vscode.workspace.createFileSystemWatcher(new vscode.RelativePattern(gitCommonDir, 'entire-sessions/*.json')),
255: 				'live session state changed',
256: 			);
257: 		}
258: 	};
259: 
260: 	const showPlaceholder = async (commandId: COMMAND_ID, message?: string) => {
261: 		appendCommandRun(commandId);
262: 		outputChannel.show(true);
263: 		await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(message ?? `${COMMAND_TITLES[commandId]} is not implemented yet.`);
264: 	};
265: 
266: 	const showStatus = async () => {
267: 		appendCommandRun(COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS);
268: 		outputChannel.show(true);
269: 		try {
270: 			const resolved = await resolveEntireBinary();
271: 			if (isEntireBinary(resolved)) {
272: 				await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(resolved.raw);
273: 			} else {
274: 				await vscode.window.showErrorMessage(resolved.message);
275: 			}
276: 		} catch (error) {
277: 			console.error(error);
278: 			await vscode.window.showErrorMessage("Error getting status of entire cli. Make sure the cli is installed and try again");
279: 		}
280: 	};
281: 
282: 	const refreshWorkspaceProbe = async (reason: string) => {
283: 		const cwd = await resolveProbeTargetPath();
284: 		if (reason === 'manual refresh' && cwd) {
285: 			resetAutomaticCheckpointFetchAttempt(cwd);
286: 		}
287: 		workspaceState = await probeEntireWorkspace(cwd);
288: 		await setWorkspaceContext(workspaceState.state);
289: 		await updateProbeWatchers(cwd);
290: 		updateStatusBarItem(statusBarItem, COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS, workspaceState);
291: 		checkpointSessionsProvider.setWorkspaceState(workspaceState, cwd);
292: 		checkpointSessionsProvider.refresh();
293: 		checkpointProvider.setWorkspaceState(workspaceState, cwd);
294: 		checkpointProvider.refresh();
295: 
296: 		if (cwd) {
297: 			outputChannel.appendLine(`[probe] ${reason}: ${cwd}`);
298: 			return;
299: 		}
300: 
301: 		outputChannel.appendLine(`[probe] ${reason}: no file-backed workspace target`);
302: 	};
303: 
304: 	const fetchCheckpointBranch = async () => {
305: 		appendCommandRun(COMMAND_ID.FETCH_CHECKPOINT_BRANCH);
306: 		outputChannel.show(true);
307: 
308: 		const repoPath = await resolveProbeTargetPath();
309: 		if (!repoPath) {
310: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("Open a repository folder to fetch Entire checkpoint metadata.");
311: 			return;
312: 		}
313: 
314: 		const fetchResult = await fetchDefaultCheckpointBranch(repoPath);
315: 		if (fetchResult.reason === "no-remote") {
316: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("No Git remote is configured for this repository.");
317: 			return;
318: 		}
319: 
320: 		const remoteName = fetchResult.remoteName ?? "unknown remote";
321: 		outputChannel.appendLine(`[fetch] Attempting ${METADATA_BRANCH_NAME} from ${remoteName}`);
322: 
323: 		if (!fetchResult.fetched) {
324: 			const details = fetchResult.details ?? "unknown fetch failure";
325: 			outputChannel.appendLine(`[fetch] Failed: ${details}`);
326: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
327: 				`Could not fetch ${METADATA_BRANCH_NAME} from ${remoteName}. ${details}`,
328: 			);
329: 			return;
330: 		}
331: 
332: 		outputChannel.appendLine(`[fetch] Fetched ${METADATA_BRANCH_NAME} from ${remoteName}`);
333: 		await refreshWorkspaceProbe(`fetched ${METADATA_BRANCH_NAME} from ${remoteName}`);
334: 		checkpointSessionsProvider.reload();
335: 		checkpointProvider.reload();
336: 		await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`Fetched ${METADATA_BRANCH_NAME} from ${remoteName}.`);
337: 	};
338: 
339: 	const openCommitChanges = async (target: CommitChangesTarget) => {
340: 		appendCommandRun(COMMAND_ID.OPEN_COMMIT_CHANGES);
341: 		if (!target.commitSha) {
342: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("Checkpoint changes could not be opened.");
343: 			return;
344: 		}
345: 
346: 		const repoPath = target.repoPath ?? await resolveProbeTargetPath();
347: 		if (!repoPath) {
348: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("Open a repository folder to inspect commit changes.");
349: 			return;
350: 		}
351: 
352: 		const gitApi = await getBuiltInGitApi();
353: 		if (!gitApi) {
354: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("VS Code Git integration is not available.");
355: 			return;
356: 		}
357: 
358: 		let repository = gitApi.getRepository(vscode.Uri.file(repoPath));
359: 		if (!repository) {
360: 			repository = await gitApi.openRepository(vscode.Uri.file(repoPath));
361: 		}
362: 
363: 		if (!repository) {
364: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("The repository is not available in VS Code Git.");
365: 			return;
366: 		}
367: 
368: 		await vscode.commands.executeCommand('git.viewCommit', repository, target.commitSha);
369: 	};
370: 
371: 	const openSessionTranscript = async (target: SessionTranscriptTarget | undefined) => {
372: 		appendCommandRun(COMMAND_ID.OPEN_SESSION_TRANSCRIPT);
373: 		if (!target) {
374: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("Session transcript could not be opened.");
375: 			return;
376: 		}
377: 
378: 		if (target.transcriptPath) {
379: 			try {
380: 				await vscode.commands.executeCommand("vscode.open", vscode.Uri.file(target.transcriptPath));
381: 				return;
382: 			} catch (error) {
383: 				const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
384: 				outputChannel.appendLine(`[session-transcript] failed to open ${target.transcriptPath}: ${message}`);
385: 			}
386: 		}
387: 
388: 		let transcript = selectTranscriptFromTarget(target);
389: 		if (!transcript) {
390: 			const repoPath = await resolveProbeTargetPath();
391: 			if (repoPath) {
392: 				transcript = await getRawTranscript(repoPath, target.checkpoint.checkpointId, target.sessionId);
393: 			}
394: 		}
395: 
396: 		if (!transcript) {
397: 			await vscode.window.showWarningMessage("No transcript is available for the selected session.");
398: 			return;
399: 		}
400: 
401: 		const document = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({
402: 			language: "plaintext",
403: 			content: transcript,
404: 		});
405: 		await vscode.window.showTextDocument(document, { preview: false });
406: 	};
407: 
408: 	await updateProbeWatchers(await resolveProbeTargetPath());
409: 	context.subscriptions.push({
410: 		dispose: () => {
411: 			if (pendingProbeRefresh) {
412: 				clearTimeout(pendingProbeRefresh);
413: 				pendingProbeRefresh = undefined;
414: 			}
415: 			disposeProbeWatchers();
416: 		},
417: 	});
418: 
419: 	context.subscriptions.push(vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(async (editor) => {
420: 		if (!isFileBackedEditor(editor)) {
421: 			return;
422: 		}
423: 
424: 		await refreshWorkspaceProbe('active editor changed');
425: 	}));
426: 
427: 	context.subscriptions.push(vscode.workspace.onDidOpenTextDocument(async (document) => {
428: 		if (document.uri.scheme !== 'file') {
429: 			return;
430: 		}
431: 
432: 		await refreshWorkspaceProbe('file opened');
433: 	}));
434: 
435: 	for (const commandId of Object.keys(COMMAND_TITLES) as COMMAND_ID[]) {
436: 		const disposable = vscode.commands.registerCommand(commandId, async (...args: unknown[]) => {
437: 			switch (commandId) {
438: 				case COMMAND_ID.REFRESH:
439: 					appendCommandRun(commandId);
440: 					outputChannel.appendLine(`[command] REFRESH: starting workspace probe`);
441: 					await refreshWorkspaceProbe('manual refresh');
442: 					outputChannel.appendLine(`[command] REFRESH: probe done, triggering checkpoint sessions reload`);
443: 					checkpointSessionsProvider.reload();
444: 					outputChannel.appendLine(`[command] REFRESH: probe done, triggering checkpoint reload`);
445: 					checkpointProvider.reload();
446: 					await vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Session Bridge Entire views refreshed.');
447: 					return;
448: 				case COMMAND_ID.FETCH_CHECKPOINT_BRANCH:
449: 					await fetchCheckpointBranch();
450: 					return;
451: 				case COMMAND_ID.BROWSE_CHECKPOINTS:
452: 					appendCommandRun(commandId);
453: 					outputChannel.appendLine(`[command] BROWSE_CHECKPOINTS: triggering checkpoint reload and focusing view`);
454: 					checkpointProvider.reload();
455: 					await vscode.commands.executeCommand(`${CHECKPOINTS_VIEW_ID}.focus`);
456: 					return;
457: 				case COMMAND_ID.OPEN_COMMIT_CHANGES: {
458: 					const target = normalizeCommitChangesTarget(args[0]);
459: 					await openCommitChanges(target);
460: 					return;
461: 				}
462: 				case COMMAND_ID.OPEN_SESSION_TRANSCRIPT: {
463: 					const target = normalizeSessionTranscriptTarget(args[0]);
464: 					await openSessionTranscript(target);
465: 					return;
466: 				}
467: 				case COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS: {
468: 					await showStatus();
469: 					break;
470: 				}
471: 				default:
472: 					await showPlaceholder(commandId);
473: 			}
474: 		});
475: 
476: 		context.subscriptions.push(disposable);
477: 	}
478: 
479: 	outputChannel.appendLine(`[activate] Registered Entire container: ${ENTIRE_CONTAINER_ID}`);
480: 	outputChannel.appendLine(`[activate] Registered views: ${TREE_VIEW_IDS.join(', ')}`);
481: }
482: 
483: export function deactivate() { }
484: 
485: /**
486:  * Returns the most specific file-backed path the extension can currently anchor on.
487:  *
488:  * When an editor is focused, the active file path is preferred because it can
489:  * belong to a nested repository that differs from the first workspace folder.
490:  * If there is no active file, the first workspace folder path is used as a
491:  * broader fallback.
492:  *
493:  * @returns Active file path when available, otherwise the first workspace folder path.
494:  */
495: function getProbeCandidatePath(): string | undefined {
496: 	const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
497: 	if (isFileBackedEditor(activeEditor)) {
498: 		return activeEditor.document.uri.fsPath;
499: 	}
500: 
501: 	const workspaceFolder = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0];
502: 	return workspaceFolder?.uri.fsPath;
503: }
504: 
505: /**
506:  * Resolves the path the extension should use for repository-backed probes and actions.
507:  *
508:  * This converts the current active file or workspace folder path into the git
509:  * repository root when possible, so checkpoint loading and file watchers operate
510:  * on the repository that actually owns the current context.
511:  *
512:  * @returns Repository root for the current UI context, or the original candidate path when no git root can be resolved.
513:  */
514: async function resolveProbeTargetPath(): Promise<string | undefined> {
515: 	const candidatePath = getProbeCandidatePath();
516: 	if (!candidatePath) {
517: 		return undefined;
518: 	}
519: 
520: 	return await getGitRepoRoot(candidatePath) ?? candidatePath;
521: }
522: 
523: function isFileBackedEditor(editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined): editor is vscode.TextEditor {
524: 	return editor?.document.uri.scheme === 'file';
525: }
526: 
527: async function getBuiltInGitApi(): Promise<GitApi | null> {
528: 	const gitExtension = vscode.extensions.getExtension<GitExtension>('vscode.git');
529: 	if (!gitExtension) {
530: 		return null;
531: 	}
532: 
533: 	const gitExports = gitExtension.isActive
534: 		? gitExtension.exports
535: 		: await gitExtension.activate();
536: 	return gitExports?.getAPI(1) ?? null;
537: }
538: 
539: function normalizeCommitChangesTarget(value: unknown): CommitChangesTarget {
540: 	if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
541: 		return {};
542: 	}
543: 
544: 	const candidate = value as {
545: 		commitSha?: unknown;
546: 		repoPath?: unknown;
547: 	};
548: 
549: 	return {
550: 		commitSha: typeof candidate.commitSha === "string" ? candidate.commitSha : undefined,
551: 		repoPath: typeof candidate.repoPath === "string" ? candidate.repoPath : undefined,
552: 	};
553: }
554: 
555: function normalizeSessionTranscriptTarget(value: unknown): SessionTranscriptTarget | undefined {
556: 	if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
557: 		return undefined;
558: 	}
559: 
560: 	const candidate = value as SessionTranscriptTarget;
561: 	if (typeof candidate.sessionId !== "string") {
562: 		return undefined;
563: 	}
564: 	if (candidate.source !== "live" && candidate.source !== "checkpoint") {
565: 		return undefined;
566: 	}
567: 
568: 	const checkpoint = normalizeSessionCheckpointEntry(candidate.checkpoint);
569: 	if (!checkpoint) {
570: 		return undefined;
571: 	}
572: 
573: 	return {
574: 		sessionId: candidate.sessionId,
575: 		promptPreview: typeof candidate.promptPreview === "string" ? candidate.promptPreview : "",
576: 		source: candidate.source,
577: 		checkpoint,
578: 		lastCheckpointId: typeof candidate.lastCheckpointId === "string" ? candidate.lastCheckpointId : undefined,
579: 		transcriptPath: typeof candidate.transcriptPath === "string" ? candidate.transcriptPath : undefined,
580: 	};
581: }
582: 
583: function selectTranscriptFromTarget(target: SessionTranscriptTarget): string | null {
584: 	if (target.checkpoint.session.metadata.sessionId !== target.sessionId) {
585: 		return null;
586: 	}
587: 
588: 	const transcript = target.checkpoint.session.transcript;
589: 	return typeof transcript === "string" && transcript.length > 0 ? transcript : null;
590: }
591: 
592: function normalizeSessionCheckpointEntry(value: unknown): SessionCheckpointEntry | undefined {
593: 	if (!value || typeof value !== "object") {
594: 		return undefined;
595: 	}
596: 
597: 	const candidate = value as SessionCheckpointEntry;
598: 	if (typeof candidate.checkpointId !== "string" || typeof candidate.sessionIndex !== "number") {
599: 		return undefined;
600: 	}
601: 	if (!candidate.session || typeof candidate.session !== "object") {
602: 		return undefined;
603: 	}
604: 	if (typeof candidate.session.metadata?.sessionId !== "string") {
605: 		return undefined;
606: 	}
607: 
608: 	return candidate;
609: }

(End of file - total 609 lines)
</content>

parts.text:
Now I can see the issue. The status bar item is created with the command `COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS` (line 94 in extension.ts), which shows the CLI status output. Looking at the code:

1. Line 94: `const statusBarItem = createStatusBarItem(COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS, workspaceState);`
2. Line 116: The tooltip says "_Click to show Entire status._" 
3. Lines 266-280: The `showStatus` function displays CLI information

To open the plugin view instead, I need to change the command to focus on one of the tree views. Let me check what command would be appropriate:

state.title: package.json

parts.text:
Perfect! I can see that the view container is `session-bridge` (line 22) and it contains two views:
- `session.bridge.entire.checkpoints` (Checkpoints)
- `session.bridge.entire.sessions` (Checkpoint Sessions)

The existing `BROWSE_CHECKPOINTS` command focuses the checkpoints view (line 455 in extension.ts). I'll modify the status bar to focus the Session Bridge view container instead of showing CLI status.

Let me update the code:

input.oldString:
tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n\n_Click to show Entire status._");

  return tooltip;
input.newString:
tooltip.appendMarkdown("\n\n_Click to open Session Bridge view._");

  return tooltip;

parts.text:
Excellent! The compilation was successful. Now let me create a summary of the changes:

## Summary

I've successfully modified the Session Bridge extension so that clicking on the status bar item now opens the Session Bridge view container instead of showing the CLI status output.

### Changes Made:

1. **`src/components/entireStatusBarItem.ts`** (line 116):
   - Updated tooltip text from "_Click to show Entire status._" to "_Click to open Session Bridge view._"

2. **`src/extension.ts`**:
   - Added new command `FOCUS_VIEW` (line 20) with ID `"session.bridge.entire.focusView"`
   - Added corresponding command title in `COMMAND_TITLES` (line 40)
   - Changed status bar item creation to use `COMMAND_ID.FOCUS_VIEW` instead of `COMMAND_ID.SHOW_STATUS` (line 96)
   - Updated `refreshWorkspaceProbe` to use `COMMAND_ID.FOCUS_VIEW` (line 293)
   - Added command handler for `FOCUS_VIEW` that executes `workbench.view.extension.session-bridge` to open the view container (lines 473-477)

### Behavior:

- **Before**: Clicking the status bar item would show a message with the Entire CLI version and status
- **After**: Clicking the status bar item now opens/focuses the Session Bridge view container in the activity bar, showing the Checkpoints and Checkpoint Sessions views

The `SHOW_STATUS` command is still available and can be accessed through the command palette if users want to check the CLI status. The compilation completed successfully with no errors or warnings.
